Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.view.ships

Class Submarine3D

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.Group
com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
com.example.battleship.view.ships.Submarine3D
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class Submarine3D extends Ship3D
Submarine: occupies 3 cells.

Built the same "printed layer by layer" way as the destroyer, but instead of a monotonic taper the hull radius follows a parabola that opens downward: narrow at the bow, widest at the middle, narrow again at the stern -- the classic torpedo silhouette. On top of that hull it carries a sail (conning tower) with a periscope and radar, a bow sonar dome, bow planes, a stern rudder/plane cross with a propeller hub, and portholes glued to the hull's real curved surface.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    buildBowPlanes(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
    A pair of small bow planes (fins) sticking out of the hull near the bow.
    private void
    buildBowSonarDome(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
    Small sonar dome bulging out at the very bow tip.
    protected javafx.scene.Group
    buildHull()
    Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
    private void
    buildPortholes(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
    A row of small dark portholes along each side of the hull, glued to its actual curved surface.
    private void
    buildPressureHull(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
    Pressure hull: a row of tapered cylinders lying along X, forming the torpedo silhouette.
    private double
    buildSail(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX, double hullLength)
    Sail (conning tower), set slightly forward of center, with a window, periscope and radar.
    private void
    buildSternCross(javafx.scene.Group group, double sternTipX)
    Stern control surfaces: a plus-shaped cross of fins plus the propeller hub.
    private double
    radiusAt(double x, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
    Same radius formula, but looked up by X position -- used to glue details to the real hull surface.
    private double
    radiusAtIndex(int index)
    The hull's radius at a given "printed slice" index: a downward parabola over t in [0, 1] (bow to stern), narrow at both ends and widest at the middle -- the torpedo shape.

  • Constructor Details

    • Submarine3D

      public Submarine3D(int row, int column, Orientation orientation)
      Parameters:
      row - board row of this ship's anchor cell (its bow)
      column - board column of this ship's anchor cell
      orientation - whether this ship extends along rows or columns from its anchor cell

  • Method Details

    • buildHull

      protected javafx.scene.Group buildHull()
      Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length. Use Ship3D.cellCenterX(int) to place distinctive features (a bridge, a periscope, an island...) at a specific cell, and Ship3D.shipCenterX() to center pieces that span the whole ship.
      Specified by:
      buildHull in class Ship3D
      Returns:
      group representing the complete hull

    • radiusAtIndex

      private double radiusAtIndex(int index)
      The hull's radius at a given "printed slice" index: a downward parabola over t in [0, 1] (bow to stern), narrow at both ends and widest at the middle -- the torpedo shape.

    • radiusAt

      private double radiusAt(double x, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
      Same radius formula, but looked up by X position -- used to glue details to the real hull surface.

    • buildPressureHull

      private void buildPressureHull(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
      Pressure hull: a row of tapered cylinders lying along X, forming the torpedo silhouette.

    • buildSail

      private double buildSail(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX, double hullLength)
      Sail (conning tower), set slightly forward of center, with a window, periscope and radar.

    • buildBowSonarDome

      private void buildBowSonarDome(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
      Small sonar dome bulging out at the very bow tip.

    • buildBowPlanes

      private void buildBowPlanes(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
      A pair of small bow planes (fins) sticking out of the hull near the bow.

    • buildSternCross

      private void buildSternCross(javafx.scene.Group group, double sternTipX)
      Stern control surfaces: a plus-shaped cross of fins plus the propeller hub.

    • buildPortholes

      private void buildPortholes(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
      A row of small dark portholes along each side of the hull, glued to its actual curved surface.
